title: All-in-One VeinMiner & TreeFelle
description: The ultimate harvesting utility for veins, trees, and 3x3 excavation. Now featuring Custom Block mining (dynamic durability cost), Anti-Break tool protection, and full enchantment support.
body:
![All-in-One VeinMiner & TreeFeller](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/1.png?raw=true)

The ultimate survival utility designed to streamline resource gathering while keeping the game perfectly balanced. Instantly fell trees, mine whole ore veins, and define your own rules with the "Custom Block Mining" feature—which dynamically scales tool durability cost and block break limits based on the world's difficulty to preserve the true survival experience.

![What's New in v1.1.5](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/2.png?raw=true)

**General Features & Improvements**

> - **Minecraft 1.21+ Support**: Updated the mod to support versions 1.21 and above in the new release.
> 
> - **Upgraded Shovel (3x3)**: Upgraded excavation area to a full 3x3 square (instead of the previous 1x3) for much faster path clearing and terraforming.
> 
> - **Mod GUI Redesign**: Completely remade the user interface to make the configuration menu more practical, organized, and smooth.
> 
> - **Dynamic Difficulty for Custom Blocks**: Durability consumption and maximum block break limits now automatically adapt to the world's difficulty.
> 
> - **Visual & Audio Enhancements**: Added new animations and a refreshed sound system for a cleaner, more satisfying block-breaking experience.

**Plugin Updates**

> - **Full Feature Parity**: All new changes, improvements, and features introduced in the mod version are now fully available and supported in the plugin version.
> 
> - **Enhanced Plugin Chat UI**: Remade and optimized the text-based interactive UI specifically for the plugin to ensure a better, cleaner, and smoother user experience.
> 
> - **New Custom Block System**: Streamlined the block-adding process; simply hold the block you want to add in your right hand and click the "Add" button.

**Bug Fixes & Security**

> - **Server Security Lockdown**: Locked configuration modification for regular players; settings are now strictly restricted to server operators (OP).
> 
> - **Fixed (/give) Tools**: Resolved the technical issue where the utility wouldn't trigger when using tools obtained via the /give command or custom items.
> 
> - **General Fixes**: Resolved various code errors and minor bugs to ensure maximum performance stability across servers and single-player worlds.
> 
![Server-Side Plugin Support](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/3.png?raw=true)

**The plugin version brings a completely overhauled interactive text experience, isolating server management directly into the chat**

> - **Enhanced Interactive Chat UI**: Configure and toggle complex features directly using redesigned, clickable interactive text lines in the game chat.
> 
> - **Right-Hand Block Registration**: Quickly add new custom blocks to the system on the fly by holding the target block in your right hand and using the interactive menu shortcut.
> 
> - **Permission Control**: Access to the configuration menu and custom block management is strictly restricted to players with Operator (OP) permissions. Regular users can use the features but cannot alter server settings.

![Gameplay Previews](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/4.png?raw=true)

![gif 5](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/Animation%20(5).gif?raw=true)
![gif 6](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/Animation%20(6).gif?raw=true)

![Core Features](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/5.png?raw=true)

- **Tree Feller**: Cut down entire trees instantly by breaking a single log block, complete with newly improved audio and visual effects.

- **Vein Miner**: Automatically detect and mine connected ore veins in a single strike.

- **Giant Shovel (3x3)**: Excavate dirt, sand, and gravel in a full 3x3 square to clear paths efficiently.

- **Smart Custom Block Support**: Manage and enable chain-breaking for any block in the game via the new **Custom Block Manager** GUI. Works across all compatible tools (Axes, Pickaxes, and Shovels).

- **Anti-Break Protection**: Automatically cancels the chain-break action if your tool is at its breaking point, keeping your rare gear safe.

![Balanced Survival Utility](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/6.png?raw=true)

- Custom Block Scaling by Difficulty: Custom blocks dynamically adapt to world difficulty to maintain balance. On Easy, tools take 2x durability damage with a maximum break limit of 64 blocks. On Hard, tools take 6x durability damage with a maximum limit of 16 blocks. Medium difficulty provides a perfectly balanced middle ground. All values can be fully customized in the settings.

- Smart Durability Tracking: Tools calculate damage for every single block destroyed in real-time. If the next block would break your tool, the process stops immediately.

- Enchantment Support: Fully compatible with Fortune and Silk Touch enchantments.

- Performance Optimized: Engineered for zero lag, even on high-player-count multiplayer servers.

![How to Use](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/7.png?raw=true)

**Chain-break mechanics only activate when Sneaking (Holding Shift) while mining**

> **Axe + Sneak**: Fells trees or custom wood-based blocks.
> 
> **Pickaxe + Sneak**: Mines veins or custom stone-based blocks.
> 
> **Shovel + Sneak**: Clears 3x3 areas of dirt, sand, gravel, or custom soil-based blocks.

(The custom block mining system automatically recognizes the specific tool held in your hand during the action).

**Note**: For more details, watch the video in the media section.

![Project Info](https://github.com/in2bubble/All-in-One-VeinMiner-TreeFeller-Media/blob/main/8.png?raw=true)

Supports Minecraft 1.21+ across:
Fabric | NeoForge | Forge | Quilt | Paper/Spigot
